channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: OpenAI launches new GPT-4.1 models with improved coding
item.description: OpenAI on Monday launched its new AI model GPT-4.1, along with smaller versions GPT-4.1 mini and GPT-4.1 nano, touting major improvements in coding, instruction following, and long context comprehension.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Uber and Lyft drivers in California could get the right to unionize under this bill
item.description: Two California Democrats have introduced a bill that would allow rideshare drivers to bargain with gig companies, including Uber and Lyft, for better pay and certain benefits.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk and Jack Dorsey want to kill IP law. That would be a huge mistake
item.description: Few statements communicate a sentiment more directly than the four words Jack Dorsey, a cofounder of Twitter, posted over the weekend on the platform he no longer controls: “delete all IP law,” was his simple message.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Why you should update your old dating app profile photos ASAP
item.description: Daters: It might be time to spring clean your dating app profile. More than 50% of young Americans have gone on a date with someone who looked different from their profile photos, according to a new survey from dating app Hily.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg takes the stand in historic antitrust trial
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg took to the witness stand on the first day of a historic antitrust trial to defend his company against allegations it illegally monopolized the social media market.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AMD squares up to Intel and Nvidia in the budget GPU arena, as leaked Radeon RX 9060 XT specs and price show a potentially mighty affordable graphics card
item.description: AMD's upcoming Radeon RX 9060 XT graphics card specs and pricing have leaked - but is it good news for PC gamers on a budget?
item.dc:creator: christian.guyton@futurenet.com (Christian Guyton), TechRadar

item.title: Meta faces potential breakup with start of antitrust trial
item.description: The US Federal Trade Commission is finally having its day in court against Meta Platforms Inc., arguing that the company must be broken up for illegally monopolizing the social media market after buying Instagram and WhatsApp more than a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Meta Resumes AI Training with European User Data
item.description: Meta to train AI models using publicly available data from EU users
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Intel sells majority stake in Altera to Silver Lake investors in a deal valued at $8.75 billion
item.description: Intel announced Monday that it was selling the majority of its Altera chip business to technology investor Silver Lake in a deal valued at $8.75 billion.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: As legacy of Ford fades in Brazil, China's BYD looks to extend global lead in EV sales
item.description: CAMACARI, Brazil (AP) — When Chinese automaker BYD Co. announced plans to build a massive factory in the hardscrabble city of Camacari, in Brazil’s northeastern Bahia state, locals saw a new beginning. After years of economic stagnation following Ford Motor Co.
item.dc:creator: FABIANO MAISONNAVE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Apple TV+ confirms it's game over for Mythic Quest as the hit show is canceled after 4 seasons
item.description: Mythic Quest will end after season 4, with one final episode airing next week to give one of the best Apple TV+ shows a good send off.
item.dc:creator: lucy.buglass@futurenet.com (Lucy Buglass), TechRadar

item.title: Sony hikes PlayStation 5 console prices for Europe, UK and Australia citing economic turmoil
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Sony said it will raise prices starting Monday for some PlayStation 5 video game consoles in Europe, Australia and New Zealand, citing global economic turmoil.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Hackers breach Morocco's social security database in an unprecedented cyberattack
item.description: RABAT, Morocco (AP) — Morocco 's social security agency said troves of data were stolen from its systems in a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the messaging app Telegram.
item.dc:creator: SAM METZ, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: OpenAI countersues Elon Musk in legal dispute over ChatGPT maker's business ambitions
item.description: OpenAI is suing Elon Musk for unfair competition and interfering with its business relationships with investors and customers, escalating a legal battle between the ChatGPT maker and the billionaire who helped bankroll the artificial intelligence startup a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: One Tech Tip: Locking down your device when crossing borders
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Planning an international trip? Travelers should prepare for the possibility of extra scrutiny of their phones when crossing borders, especially when entering the United States. The Canadian government warned travelers in a recent travel advisory that U.S.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: CISA under review: Trump memo spurs scrutiny and uncertainty
item.description: The Trump administration has issued a directive against Christopher Krebs, the founding director and former head of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) for weaponizing and abusing his government authority during his tenure.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DSPy: An open-source framework for LLM-powered applications
item.description: The past year has seen explosive growth in generative AI and the tools for integrating generative AI models into applications. Developers are eager to harness large language models (LLMs) to build smarter applications, but doing so effectively remains challenging.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: April update has broken Windows Hello for some devices but there’s a quick fix
item.description: A software hiccup has occurred with Windows Hello following this month’s security updates, one that could prevent users from logging in via facial recognition.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft said it is “slowing or pausing” some of its data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio, the latest sign that the demand for artificial intelligence technology that drove a massive infrastructure expansion might not need quite as many powerful computers as expected.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hydrogen fuel cell trucks hit the roads in Georgia
item.description: Hydrogen trucks debut in Georgia, sparking debates on costs and green freight gains. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson comments on this promising chapter in green logistics evolution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
